Dependence - Full staff performance of activity during entire 7 days, 8 = Activity did not occur during entire 7 days.
207 G1AB G1AB_SUPP_BED (G1AB) Bed Mobility Support Provided CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: bed mobility - ADL support provided. "-" = Unknown, 0 = No setup or physical help from staff, 1 = Setup help only, 2 = One person physical assist, 3 = Two+ person physical assist, 8 = ADL activity itself did not occur during entire 7 days
208 G1BA G1BA_SELF_TRANS
